data.name: 黑獸‧改
data.detailed_description:
遊戲特色

  • 登場的女主角皆有全程配音！
  • 遊玩時間：2小時～

登場角色


被譽為女神轉生的高等精靈
賽蕾絲汀・盧可路斯"
CV：Naru Udaka
高等精靈。被認為是艾奧斯人民普遍信仰的女神「菈蓮緹雅」的轉生。
受到「七盾同盟」所有人民的景仰、尊敬與愛戴，
但另一方面，魔物們對她恨之入骨。

「我會相信大家……為大家祈禱……並且見證到最後……」


驕傲的闇精靈女王
奧莉嘉・迪斯克蒂亞
CV：Tokio Aoi
有著一頭黑色長髮，慵懶的表情令人印象深刻的高傲闇精靈女王。
純粹的闇精靈非常罕見，是比高等精靈更稀有的存在。
闇精靈認為自己是非常高貴的種族，因此看不起其他種族。
他們會使用能讓魔物的身體能力增強數倍的稀有妖術，
是這場持續數百年之久的戰爭的罪魁禍首。

「這裡……是不可入侵的神聖領域……不會讓汝等亂來……」


發誓為女王效忠的年輕親信
珂洛依
CV：Tori King
擔任女王親信的女騎士，發誓永遠效忠奧莉嘉。
是闇精靈與人類的混血兒。從出生到被女王帶走的這段期間，
她遭到人類非常殘忍的對待，所以打從心底討厭人類。
個性非常耿直。

「我會永遠侍奉您，直到此身消滅……我的女王……」


高潔貌美的公主騎士
愛麗西雅・阿克瓊斯
CV：Ichigo Momoi
艾奧斯的名門貴族「阿克瓊斯家」的獨生女。
是「第一要塞」這個主要軍事部隊──聖愛麗思騎士團的團長。
她的實力絕非來自父母的光環，
而且受到身為要塞人民的部下極大的敬重與憧憬。
雖然身為大臣的比茲利抱有謀反之意，
但愛麗西雅對此毫無所知。

「這毫無道理……背叛的行為……我絕對饒不了那個男人……！」


東洋風打扮的神祕巫女
輝夜
CV：Mariya Kurata
「第三要塞」的統治者，敬仰外貌奇特的神的巫女集團首領。
總是非常安靜，讓人無法讀懂想法，給人一種超凡脫俗的印象。
雖然會照顧部下，但基本上對其信仰的神以外的事物毫不關心。
她被過去師出同門，如今卻墮入魔道的「蠱師」盯上，
只因想將她當成實驗品，創造出超越神的神。

「我們的本分是唯神是從……按照神的旨意行事……」


高傲的聖騎士團長
克蘿迪雅・黎瓦汀
CV：Mei Misonoo
同時守護著「第六要塞」與「第七要塞」，
並負責護衛高等精靈賽蕾絲汀的騎士團長。
即使是個有丈夫的忠貞人妻，戰鬥時依然能發揮出鬼神般的戰鬥力。
雖然與擔任文官的丈夫「克勞斯」之間關係融洽，
但沒有小孩是唯一的煩惱。

「請放心。『七盾同盟』全軍會團結一致，全力粉碎來襲的敵人。」

故事大綱

位於「賽萊努斯大陸」西方的平原地帶「艾奧斯」。

數百年來，同盟軍與魔軍以位於其北方境界線的七個要塞為中心，
展開了一場跨世紀的攻防戰。
而這場戰爭，似乎就快以闇精靈女王的力量衰退為契機，
迎來最終局面。

受到身為女神轉世的高等精靈號召，同盟軍組成了「七盾同盟」，
日日夜夜與魔軍對抗。為了替這場戰爭劃下句點，
同盟軍委託了以主角為首的傭兵軍團──
黑犬傭兵團作為全面戰爭的前鋒部隊。

但黑犬傭兵團在侵略了闇精靈女王的國家後，
便將大本營轉移到闇精靈女王的國家，
並開始進攻過去的同盟國。

面對流露出震驚、恐慌、憤怒、悲傷等各種反應的同盟軍方，
率領傭兵軍團背叛的主角做出了宣言，
結果讓同盟軍方的所有人都不禁懷疑自己的耳朵。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.0GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 128MB+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM (DirectSound support)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 2.0GHz+
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 256MB+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM (DirectSound support)

data.name: Kuroinu Redux
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel that tells the story of a mercenary who betrays the allies who sent him into battle.

FEATURES

  • 2+ hours of story
  • Full Japanese voice acting by seasoned professionals

CHARACTERS


Revered high-elf goddess incarnate
Celestine Lucross
A high elf revered as the reincarnation of the Goddess Larentia, who is widely worshipped by the people of Eos. She is adored, respected, and loved by all of the people of the Seven Shield Alliance, but in that same vein, she is abhored by all demons. Her flawless skin and beauty are known far and wide.

“I have faith in everybody... I pray for us... And I will continue to watch until the very end...”


Supreme dark-elven matriarch
Olga Dischordia
Voice: Tokio Aoi
The dark-elf queen of a fallen kingdom, with long black hair and a perpetual, almost melancholic expression. Pure dark elves are extremely rare, rarer even than high elves. She considers dark elves to be a noble race far and above other races. As a witch, she possesses the unique ability to increase the physical prowess of monsters several times over—and is the cause of hundreds of years of war and atrocities.

“This... is a holy site... You cannot enter it...”


Faithful royal retainer
Chloe
Voice: Tori King
Young knightess and loyal attendant to Olga, having sworn lifelong allegiance to her queen. She is half dark elf, half mortal, but despises all men because of the terrible treatment she suffered at human hands from birth until Olga took her in. Exceedingly straight-laced.

“I will serve my queen until my body wastes away...”


Proud princess knight
Alicia Arcturus
Voice: Ichigo Momoi
The beautiful sole daughter of the Arcturus family, a prestigious noble family in Eos. As commander of the Knights of St. Iris—the main military unit at Fortress One—she is highly respected and admired by her subordinates. Her skills are a credit to her own perseverance and not a reflection of her bloodline. Minister Beardsley is plotting against her somehow, though she remains oblivious.

“This is absurd... This is treachery... I will not forgive that man...!”


Mysterious Eastern priestess
Kaguya
Voice: Mariya Kurata
The leader of Fortress Three, she is the chief of a group of priestesses who worship strange gods. Always quiet, with a vague air that makes it difficult to read her mind. While attentive to her subordinates, she is essentially uninterested in anything other than the gods she serves. She is now being targeted by an Evocator, who was once a member of her group but has fallen off the righteous path, and is now set on subjecting her to an experiment to create a god to surpass all gods...

“Our task... is to behave as the gods desire...”


Ex-captain of the Holy Knights
Claudia Levantine
Voice: Mei Misonoo
Leader of a knighthood that defends Fortress Six and Fortress Seven, she also serves as the high elf Celestine’s personal bodyguard. A moral woman married to a civilian named Klaus, when it comes to battle, she is as formidable as a war god. Though happily married, she has yet to bear a child.

“Please be at ease. All the armies of the Seven Shields Alliance will fight together and crush our foe.”

SUMMARY

Eos, the western plains of the continent of Serenus—

With the dark-elven queen’s influence finally waning, the centuries-long war between the allied races and her demon army seems to be entering its final phase...

Desperate to end the bloodshed once and for all, the Seven Shields Alliance—seven strongholds along Eos’s northernmost border united by an elven reincarnation of the Goddess Larentia—seek out the assistance of the protagonist Vult and his Black Dog Mercenaries.

However, the young Vult wastes no time in betraying them, moving his headquarters to the realm of the dark elf Queen Olga herself!

Shock, panic, indignation, then grief... Eos’s inhabitants cannot believe their fate at the hands of this treacherous “hero” as he leads his minions into their towns and villages, and even the lands of former friends and allies.

data.short_description: Desperate to end a bloody war, the Seven Shields Alliance—led by an elven goddess incarnate—seek out the assistance of the protagonist Vult and his Black Dog Mercenaries. He turns on them and takes control in this visual novel story of betrayal.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 1.0GHz
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: VRAM 128MB+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM (DirectSound support)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 2.0GHz+
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: VRAM 256MB+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM (DirectSound support)
